parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date($json.target_month + 'T00:00:00Z'); d.setUTCMonth(d.getUTCMonth() - 1); return $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/financial_actuals?month=eq.' + d.toISOString().slice(0,10) + '&select=*'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: 'Financial Data Needed: ' + $json.report_label, html: $json.email_html }) }}
